title: convolvulus rectangularis
intro: Convolvulus rectangularis, also known as the Square Bindweed, is a type of flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Convolvulus rectangularis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
